```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: Define SLIs/SLOs and align alerts with user-impact objectives.
---
Task:
Specify service reliability goals and measurement strategy.
Requirements:
Define SLIs, target SLOs, and reporting windows.
Constraints:
Avoid vanity metrics disconnected from user experience.
Success Criteria:
SLOs are measurable, realistic, and operationally actionable.
```
